title: Emotions, Behaviour, and Identity Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Feeling worried or a little afraid about something that might happen.
choices: nervous
anxious
doubtful
rounds.answer: nervous
rounds.explanation: nervous: Feeling worried or a little afraid about something that might happen.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Kind and soft in the way you act; not rough or loud.
choices: nervous
anxious
gentle
rounds.answer: gentle
rounds.explanation: gentle: Kind and soft in the way you act; not rough or loud.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Very bad or cruel.
choices: anxious
evil
nervous
rounds.answer: evil
rounds.explanation: evil: Very bad or cruel.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Feeling very worried, with lots of worried thoughts.
rounds.answer: anxious

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Showing good manners and being kind to others.
rounds.answer: polite

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Quiet and a little afraid to talk to other people.
rounds.answer: shy

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: I felt nervous before my big test at school.
He felt doubtful about winning the game.
The generous boy gave his snack to a friend.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: Happy to share or give to others.
Kind and soft in the way you act; not rough or loud.
Not joking or silly; important and needing attention.
Only caring about yourself and not about other people.
rounds.answer: Kind and soft in the way you act; not rough or loud.
rounds.explanation: She gave the puppy a gentle hug.

choices: Funny, or making people laugh.
Not joking or silly; important and needing attention.
Only caring about yourself and not about other people.
Showing good manners and being kind to others.
rounds.answer: Showing good manners and being kind to others.
rounds.explanation: It is polite to say 'please' and 'thank you.'

choices: Funny, or making people laugh.

Very strong, powerful, or angry.
rounds.answer: Happy to share or give to others.
rounds.explanation: The generous boy gave his snack to a friend.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The teacher told a humorous story, and everyone laughed.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The shy girl hid behind her mother.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Riding a bike without a helmet is risky.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'generous' mean in this unit?
choices: Happy to share or give to others.
Feeling worried or a little afraid about something that might happen.
Feeling very worried, with lots of worried thoughts.
rounds.answer: Happy to share or give to others.
rounds.explanation: generous: Happy to share or give to others.

rounds.prompt: What does 'ethnic' mean in this unit?
choices: Feeling worried or a little afraid about something that might happen.
Feeling very worried, with lots of worried thoughts.
Belonging to a group of people who share the same culture, language, or history.
rounds.answer: Belonging to a group of people who share the same culture, language, or history.
rounds.explanation: ethnic: Belonging to a group of people who share the same culture, language, or history.

rounds.prompt: What does 'anxious' mean in this unit?
choices: Not sure that something is true or will happen.
Feeling very worried, with lots of worried thoughts.
Feeling worried or a little afraid about something that might happen.
rounds.answer: Feeling very worried, with lots of worried thoughts.
rounds.explanation: anxious: Feeling very worried, with lots of worried thoughts.
